arts.sum: Arsenal’s chances of signing Athletic Bilbao winger Nico Williams have been dealt a major blow. The Spaniard, who was part of Spain’s Euro 2024 winning team last year, has caught the attention of Arsenal and some other big clubs with his consistent performances for his club and country. arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres issues transfer message amid Arsenal interest
arts.sum: The Sweden international has emerged as a key transfer target for the Gunners following the appointment of Andrea Berta as their new sporting director and Arsenal are expected to intensify their pursuit of the 26-year-old over the next few weeks. However, the former are currently his most likely destination as Arteta pushes to bring Gyokeres to the Emirates Stadium amid his pursuit of a prolific new centre forward.

arts.sum: Rafael van der Vaart is no stranger to irking people with his brazen approach to punditry.
